name: Fusilli Bucati with Soft Shell Crabs
recipeIngredient: 6 Anaheim peppers, cored, seeded, and julienned
4 red jalapenos, cored, seeded, and julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to boil in a large spaghetti pot and add 2 tablespoons of salt.
2. Clean soft shell crabs by snipping off their faces with a pair of scissors and removing the skirt. Cut in half and set aside.
3. In a 12-14 inch saute pan, heat olive oil until smoking. Add onions, Anaheim peppers, jalapenos and cook until softened, about 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Add the crab pieces and continue cooking until crabs are deep red and firm. Be careful not to break up the crabs with aggressive stirring. Add the white wine and tomato sauce and reduce by half. Add escarole and cook another 1 minute until escarole has wilted, then remove from heat.
5. Drop fusilli into boiling water and cook according to package instructions until al dente (about 7 to 9 minutes). Drain pasta well in colander.
6. Pour hot pasta into the pan with crabs. Return to medium heat and toss to coat well, about 1 minute.
7. Pour into heated serving platter and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
